description: Public URL of your Plausible instance (e.g., https://plausible.yourdomain.com). No trailing slash.
64-byte random string for cookie signing and secrets. Auto-generated.
PostgreSQL connection string. Add a Railway Postgres service to auto-inject.
ClickHouse connection string. Default works with Railway's ClickHouse add-on as a companion service named 'clickhouse'.
Set to true to disable public registration after creating your admin account.
Set to true to require email verification for new users.
